1110000000100111 0011011110010011 1 -> sum: 0001011110111011, cout: 1
0010001101100011 1110010101111110 1 -> sum: 0000100011100010, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
